body:
This PR:
- Updates to ClimaCore 0.13.1 to use `interpolate!`. Now, the output diagnostics array is allocated only once, and reused.
- Adds a IO performance job. This job benchmarks the IO portion of the NetCDF writer and it compares the performance of our NetCDF writer with just using NCDatasets. Currently, calling sync makes our writer much slower. This will be subject to future investigations.
- Adds a NEWS.md
title: Add job to benchmark IO
